channel.title: Apache DataFusion Blog - Manabu McCloskey (AWS), Vara Bonthu (AWS)

item.title: What two months with the Comet community got our Spark workload on Amazon EKS
item.description: Apache DataFusion Comet now runs a 3TB TPC-DS workload significantly faster than vanilla Spark 3.5.8 on Amazon EKS. This post covers what changed in Comet over the past two releases, and how collaboration between EKS users and maintainers shaped that work.
item.dc:creator: Manabu McCloskey (AWS), Vara Bonthu (AWS)
